tasks.title: Implement planner agent to generate task JSON
tasks.description: Create internal/agent/planner.go to call the HuggingFace inference endpoint, send codebase context, and deserialize the LLM response into task structs.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate HTTP request/response in a Planner interface to allow mock implementations for testing.

tasks.title: Build devdive init CLI workflow
tasks.description: In cmd/init/main.go, orchestrate scanning, planning, optional GitHub repo creation, issue creation, devdive.json write, initial commit via Contents API, and launch the server.
tasks.design_notes: Structure the command as a series of services injected via a context to keep business logic testable.

tasks.title: Create file watcher and WebSocket broadcast
tasks.description: Implement internal/server/watcher.go using fsnotify to monitor devdive.json changes and push updated state to all connected WebSocket clients.
tasks.design_notes: Use a thread‑safe hub with channels to decouple file events from WebSocket writes.

tasks.title: Develop git watcher for semantic commit analysis
tasks.description: Add internal/watchers/git.go to poll git logs, send diffs to the LLM via internal/agent/commitanalysis.go, and update task progress in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Cache the last processed commit SHA to avoid re‑processing and run analysis asynchronously.

tasks.title: Implement design review and drift detection
tasks.description: Create internal/watchers/review.go and internal/agent/designreview.go to trigger on every 10 commits or manual command, comparing changed files against design notes via the LLM.
tasks.design_notes: Store review findings in devdive.json under a 'drift' array with severity levels for dashboard rendering.

tasks.title: Build embedded HTTP & WebSocket server
tasks.description: Finish internal/server/server.go to serve the go:embed Vite dist, handle WebSocket upgrades, and expose a health endpoint.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage gorilla/websocket and set read/write deadlines to protect against idle connections.

tasks.title: Implement sync command to refresh issue states
tasks.description: In cmd/sync/main.go, fetch current GitHub issue statuses via internal/github/issues.go and merge updates into devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Perform a read‑modify‑write cycle with file locking to prevent race conditions with the watcher.

tasks.title: Add rollback command for devdive.json versioning
tasks.description: Create cmd/rollback/main.go to checkout a specified commit SHA of devdive.json, update the local file, and push the rollback commit through the Contents API.
tasks.design_notes: Validate SHA existence via git rev-parse and provide user confirmation before overwriting state.
